productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Turquoise Blue Magic Colour Jeans
description: CompositionWashed turquoise blue coloured jeans made of 98.6% cotton and 1.4% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front with one change pocket, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand patch appliqué d on the waistband at the back and a zipper and button closureFitjealous 21 Hottie fitColour changeTurquoise blue changes to greenWash careMachine or hand wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsjealous 21 has introduced an exclusive range of "Magic Jeans" which change colour when you wear them. The jeans change colour with the rise and fall of temperature - when you wear them your body heat kicks off the change. When taken off, the fabric cools down and returns to its original hue. The hotter you are the faster it changes colour. This product is the highlight of the season and is perfect for the fashionable you. Designed to contour the hips and fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time, just choose the best fit for your shape. You might not want to take these denims off once you pull them on! It'll go perfectly with your t-shirts and dressy tops, style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8&rdquo and waist 28"
